commands.name: forge-browser-screenshot
commands.label: Capture Screenshot
commands.description: Open a URL and capture a screenshot for visual verification.

commands.name: forge-browser-visual-test
commands.label: Run Visual Test
commands.description: Diff a URL against a baseline screenshot for visual regression.

commands.name: forge-browser-ui-review
commands.label: Review UI
commands.description: Run a multi-viewport UI review and capture responsive findings.

commands.name: forge-browser-a11y-audit
commands.label: Audit Accessibility
commands.description: Run a WCAG accessibility audit against a URL.

commands.name: forge-browser-deploy-verify
commands.label: Verify Deployment
commands.description: Compare pre-deploy vs post-deploy screenshots and flag regressions.

commands.name: forge-browser-journey
commands.label: Run Customer Journey
commands.description: Execute a multi-step customer journey and capture screenshots for review.
